scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run cf:check && npm run test:e2e
scripts.cf:dev: npm run build && WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false WRANGLER_SEND_ERROR_REPORTS=false wrangler dev
scripts.cf:preview: npm run build && WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false WRANGLER_SEND_ERROR_REPORTS=false wrangler versions upload
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false WRANGLER_SEND_ERROR_REPORTS=false wrangler deploy
